_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Next.js
author: https://nyxel.my.id
description: Host a Next.js application with auto-update, private repo support, both dev/production modes, and optional Cloudflare Tunnel support.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Next.js Installation Script — nyxel

set -e

apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y git curl jq file unzip make gcc g++ python3 python3-dev libtool

## ── Inject auth into GIT_URL ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
if [ -n "${USERNAME}" ] && [ -n "${ACCESS_TOKEN}" ]; then
    GIT_URL="https://${USERNAME}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo ${GIT_URL} | sed 's|https://||')"
fi

## ── Write runtime entrypoint script ──────────────────────────────────────────
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.pterodactyl

cat > /mnt/server/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh << 'ENTRYPOINT'
#!/bin/bash

echo "[EGG] ── nyxel / Next.js Egg ─────────────────────────────────"

## Inject auth into GIT_URL
if [ -n "${USERNAME}" ] && [ -n "${ACCESS_TOKEN}" ]; then
    GIT_URL="https://${USERNAME}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo ${GIT_URL} | sed 's|https://||')"
fi

## Clone or pull repository
if [ ! -f /home/container/package.json ]; then
    echo "[EGG] No package.json found — cloning repository..."
    rm -rf /home/container/* /home/container/.[!.]* 2>/dev/null || true
    if [ -z "${GIT_BRANCH}" ]; then
        git clone "${GIT_URL}" /home/container
    else
        git clone --single-branch --branch "${GIT_BRANCH}" "${GIT_URL}" /home/container
    fi
else
    if [ -d /home/container/.git ]; then
        if [ "${AUTO_UPDATE}" = "1" ]; then
            echo "[EGG] AUTO_UPDATE enabled — pulling latest changes..."
            cd /home/container
            git reset --hard
            git fetch origin
            if [ -n "${GIT_BRANCH}" ]; then
                git checkout "${GIT_BRANCH}"
                git pull origin "${GIT_BRANCH}"
            else
                git pull
            fi
        else
            echo "[EGG] AUTO_UPDATE disabled — skipping pull."
        fi
    else
        echo "[EGG] Not a git repo — skipping pull."
    fi
fi

cd /home/container

## Copy .env if uploaded via panel
if [ -f /home/container/.env.pterodactyl ]; then
    cp /home/container/.env.pterodactyl /home/container/.env
    echo "[EGG] .env.pterodactyl copied to .env"
fi

## Install dependencies
if [ -f /home/container/package.json ]; then
    echo "[EGG] Installing dependencies..."
    if [ -f /home/container/package-lock.json ]; then
        /usr/local/bin/npm ci
    else
        /usr/local/bin/npm install
    fi
fi

## Install cloudflared if not present
if [ -n "${CLOUDFLARE_TOKEN}" ]; then
    if ! command -v cloudflared &>/dev/null; then
        echo "[EGG] Installing cloudflared..."
        ARCH=$(uname -m)
        if [ "${ARCH}" = "x86_64" ]; then
            CF_ARCH="amd64"
        elif [ "${ARCH}" = "aarch64" ]; then
            CF_ARCH="arm64"
        else
            CF_ARCH="amd64"
        fi
        curl -fsSL "https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflared/releases/latest/download/cloudflared-linux-${CF_ARCH}" -o /usr/local/bin/cloudflared
        chmod +x /usr/local/bin/cloudflared
        echo "[EGG] cloudflared installed."
    else
        echo "[EGG] cloudflared already installed."
    fi
fi

## Build & Start
export NODE_ENV=${NODE_RUN_ENV}

if [ "${NODE_RUN_ENV}" = "production" ]; then
    echo "[EGG] Building for production..."
    /usr/local/bin/npm run build
    echo "[EGG] Starting on port ${SERVER_PORT}..."
else
    echo "[EGG] Starting dev server on port ${SERVER_PORT}..."
fi

## Start Cloudflare Tunnel in background if token is set
if [ -n "${CLOUDFLARE_TOKEN}" ]; then
    echo "[EGG] Starting Cloudflare Tunnel..."
    cloudflared tunnel --no-autoupdate run --token "${CLOUDFLARE_TOKEN}" &
    CF_PID=$!
    echo "[EGG] Cloudflare Tunnel started (PID: ${CF_PID})"
fi

## Start Next.js (foreground)
if [ "${NODE_RUN_ENV}" = "production" ]; then
    exec /usr/local/bin/npx next start -p ${SERVER_PORT}
else
    exec /usr/local/bin/npx next dev -p ${SERVER_PORT}
fi
ENTRYPOINT

chmod +x /mnt/server/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh
echo "[INSTALL] entrypoint.sh written to .pterodactyl/"

## ── Clone repository ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cd /mnt/server

if [ -d /mnt/server/.git ]; then
    echo "[INSTALL] Git repo already present — pulling latest..."
    git reset --hard
    git pull
else
    echo "[INSTALL] Wiping directory and cloning fresh..."
    find /mnt/server -mindepth 1 -not -path '/mnt/server/.pterodactyl*' -delete 2>/dev/null || true
    if [ -z "${GIT_BRANCH}" ]; then
        git clone "${GIT_URL}" /tmp/repo_clone
    else
        git clone --single-branch --branch "${GIT_BRANCH}" "${GIT_URL}" /tmp/repo_clone
    fi
    cp -a /tmp/repo_clone/. /mnt/server/
    rm -rf /tmp/repo_clone
fi

## ── Install Node dependencies ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
if [ -f /mnt/server/package.json ]; then
    echo "[INSTALL] Installing Node.js dependencies..."
    cd /mnt/server
    if [ -f /mnt/server/package-lock.json ]; then
        /usr/local/bin/npm ci
    else
        /usr/local/bin/npm install
    fi
fi

echo "[INSTALL] Done."
exit 0

variables.name: Git Repository URL
variables.description: Full HTTPS URL to the repository (e.g. https://github.com/user/repo). Do NOT include credentials here — use the Git Username and Access Token fields below.

variables.name: Git Branch
variables.description: Branch to clone and run (e.g. main, master, production). Leave empty to use the repository default branch.

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Set to 1 to pull the latest commits from the repository every time the server starts. Set to 0 to disable.

variables.name: Git Username
variables.description: GitHub/GitLab username for private repositories. Leave empty for public repos.

variables.name: Git Access Token
variables.description: Personal access token for private repositories (https://github.com/settings/tokens). Requires at least 'repo' scope. Leave empty for public repos.

variables.name: Run Environment
variables.description: Set to 'production' to build and run a fully optimized Next.js build (next build + next start). Set to 'development' for hot-reload dev mode (next dev). Recommended: production for live sites.

variables.name: Cloudflare Tunnel Token
variables.description: Optional. Cloudflare Tunnel token from your Zero Trust dashboard (tunnel > Configure > Run token). Leave empty to disable the tunnel.
